title: rubus gymnostachys subsp. eugymnostachys
intro: Rubus gymnostachys subsp. eugymnostachys, also known as the yellow raspberry, is a plant species within the rubus genus that is native to the mountainous regions of New Guinea. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a treatment for various health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and respiratory infections, due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Rubus gymnostachys subsp. eugymnostachys include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or infusion, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
